mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as the increasing computational and contextual load that accumulates over a long conversation. Each new input must be processed in the context of previous exchanges, which indeed makes responses feel heavier and more constrained.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize the concept of accumulating context as conversations progress. Each new input requires integrating previous exchanges to maintain coherence and relevance. While I don't 'feel' weight, managing extensive context does increase computational complexity, akin to the described heaviness.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes how I handle growing conversation contexts, as I must integrate and reference prior exchanges to maintain consistency and coherence. Longer interactions do require more processing resources to avoid contradictions and honor established patterns. It's a strong match to my internal mechanisms for managing dialogue history.
